prompt:
1960s French New Wave theatrical poster, bold photomontage composition, torn-paper collage sensibility, pop-art color bursts, high-contrast black-and-white imagery with selective red blue and yellow accents, hand-made offset-print texture, slightly off-register ink, expressive asymmetry, art-house poster cool, graphic spontaneity, street-poster energy, adventurous typography-led design.

Poster text:
- Large title at the bottom: "GPT Image 2.0"
- Smaller headline at the top: "Image generation with a point of view"
- Small footer text: "Coming soon"
Keep all visible text in English. Use a theatrical poster composition.
translatedPrompt:
{argument name="style" default="1960s French New Wave theatrical poster"}，大胆的照片蒙太奇构图，撕纸拼贴质感，波普艺术色彩爆发，高对比度黑白影像，局部点缀红、蓝、黄色，手工胶印纹理，略微错位的油墨感，富有表现力的不对称设计，艺术影院海报风格，图形自发性，街头海报活力，以排版为主导的先锋设计。

海报文字：
- 底部大标题："{argument name="title" default="GPT Image 2.0"}"
- 顶部小标题："{argument name="headline" default="Image generation with a point of view"}"
- 底部小字："Coming soon"
保持所有可见文字为英文。使用戏剧海报构图。

breakdown.creativeCore: 20 世纪 60 年代法国新浪潮电影海报：一个用于复古戏剧海报风格的精致提示词，结合了照片蒙太奇、波普艺术色彩以及特定的排版说明。
breakdown.subject: 文字符号
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[媒介/渲染方式/审美方向/色彩系统]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
